title: glandularia angustilobata
intro: Glandularia angustilobata, also known as the Narrow-leaf Verbena, is a flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. Glandularia angustilobata is valued for its health benefits, including wound healing, digestive issues, and antifungal properties, making it a useful remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its essential oils can be used in aromatherapy or topically applied for skin issues.
